understanding.goal_understanding: Finish the current level (BP35) by reaching the goal gem tile marked `+` without dying, then continue clearing subsequent levels until the game is won, staying within the 2 attempts and 50 turns per attempt.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose an action. `MOVE_LEFT`/`MOVE_RIGHT` shifts horizontally by one tile, then gravity automatically carries the character in the current gravity direction until landing on a solid/support tile, reaching the goal `+`, or hitting a hazard. Landing on spike tiles (`u`/`v`) ends the attempt immediately. `CLICK` targets a specific grid coordinate to interact with clickable tiles, primarily removing breakable blocks (`x`) to open or change fall paths; clicks do not consume moving-platform time (when present). `UNDO` reverts the previous action to recover from a mistake.
